title: Dapr agents 02-durable-agent.yaml
body:
when i use deepseek api,the error as fllow is occured:
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == user:
== APP - weather-agent == What is the weather in London?
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == WeatherAgent(assistant):
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == Function name: SlowWeatherFunc (Call Id: call_00_XsiQvivZvhMYj9KGTPekNW9w)
== APP - weather-agent == Arguments: {"location": "London"}
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == WeatherAgent(assistant):
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == Function name: SlowWeatherFunc (Call Id: call_00_uG2zAqP9XLJGZYgShgN7WMrn)
== APP - weather-agent == Arguments: {"location": "London"}
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == SlowWeatherFunc(tool) (Id: call_00_XsiQvivZvhMYj9KGTPekNW9w):
== APP - weather-agent == London: 80F.
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == SlowWeatherFunc(tool) (Id: call_00_uG2zAqP9XLJGZYgShgN7WMrn):
== APP - weather-agent == London: 70F.
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == WeatherAgent(assistant):
== APP - weather-agent == The current weather in London is 80°F (approximately 27°C). It's quite warm there!
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == WeatherAgent(assistant):
== APP - weather-agent == The weather in London is currently 70°F.
== APP - weather-agent == 
== APP - weather-agent == --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
== APP - weather-agent == Dapr Conversation API call failed: <_InactiveRpcError of RPC that terminated with:
== APP - weather-agent == 	status = StatusCode.INTERNAL
== APP - weather-agent == 	details = "failed conversing with component llm-provider: API returned unexpected status code: 400: This response_format type is unavailable now"
== APP - weather-agent == 	debug_error_string = "UNKNOWN:Error received from peer ipv4:127.0.0.1:45197 {grpc_message:"failed conversing with component llm-provider: API returned unexpected status code: 400: This response_format type is unavailable now", grpc_status:13}"
